description: Persistent issue tracker. Decider appends new issues from Curmudgeon reviews, marks resolved when wins.json no longer contains the flagged text.

issues.description: SEC-4.2.4 (data/sections.json:part4.html, details id=p4-424) presents per-sub-test analysis for E-PRED-A, B, C, and D as if all four are currently labeled on the live dome predictions page. As of 2026-05-07, only E-PRED-B ("E-PRED-B LOCKED") is explicitly labeled; A, C, and D are folded into the Tier 1/2/3 κ-coupling protocol without explicit E-PRED labels. EXP-292 patched the parallel occurrence in SEC-8b.3; this issue tracks the analogous fix needed in SEC-4.2.4: anchor each sub-test's label-presence claim to the 2026-03-12 snapshot date and note current live-page status. Flagged by EXP-292 parallel_issue_flag field. Additionally, SEC-4.2.4's TLDR mischaracterizes E-PRED-C as "(E-PRED-C, timing lag)" when E-PRED-C is actually "SG gravimeters 0.0 µGal" — a null gravity prediction, not a timing lag. TLDR factual error severity: major (readers see TLDRs first). The TLDR text should read "(E-PRED-C, gravity null)" or "(E-PRED-C, SG gravimeter null)". Body prose is correct; only TLDR is wrong. Flagged by curmudgeon review SEC-8b.3.c8.json (hole 3), reviewed_at 2026-05-07T18:44:26.580Z.
issues.fix_details: TLDR sub-issue FIXED 2026-05-08 via direct FUSE edit (bash unavailable, disk full): replaced '(E-PRED-C, timing lag)' with '(E-PRED-C, gravity null)' in data/sections.json. workspace-sync will push within 1h; HTML rebuild needed on next successful decider run. REMAINING: the per-sub-test E-PRED label-presence snapshot anchor fix (the EXP-292 analogy) is OPEN — requires analyst EXP for the fuller prose rework of SEC-4.2.4 body. Keeping issue open to track remaining body-prose work.
issues.tldr_fix_verification_pattern: git show origin/main:data/sections.json | grep -qF '(E-PRED-C, gravity null)'
issues.recommended_action: EXP: Patch SEC-4.2.4 (part4.html, p4-424) analogously to EXP-292: preserve per-sub-test analysis but anchor each E-PRED label-presence claim to the 2026-03-12 snapshot, and note that as of 2026-05-07 only E-PRED-B is explicitly labeled on the live page (A, C, D folded into Tier 1/2/3 protocol).
issues.severity_upgraded_by: decider — curmudgeon review SEC-8b.3.c8.json hole 3: TLDR factual error; per curmudgeon.md TLDR factual errors are MAJOR
issues.tldr_fix_verified_by: decider: git show origin/main:data/sections.json | grep gravity.null => 1 match
issues.routing_reason: TLDR fix confirmed in git (E-PRED-C, gravity null). Remaining: body prose E-PRED label-presence anchoring in SEC-4.2.4 (p4-424) — anchor each sub-test label claim to 2026-03-12 snapshot and note as-of-2026-05-07 only E-PRED-B is explicitly labeled on live page.

issues.title: Integrity minor: podaac-tools.jpl.nasa.gov is unreachable from the integrity sandbox (DNS resolve
issues.description: podaac-tools.jpl.nasa.gov is unreachable from the integrity sandbox (DNS resolves, connection times out). Affects 4 links to GRACE L1A documentation PDFs (GRACE_L1A_TM_JPL_v1.0.pdf x3, ProdSpecDoc_v4.6.pdf x1). Main podaac.jpl.nasa.gov domain returns 200. Likely a sandbox firewall restriction rather than a real outage.
issues.suggested_fix: Verify reachability from a browser. If the subdomain is genuinely retired, update to the redirect target at podaac.jpl.nasa.gov/gravity/grace-documentation (which returns 200). No urgent action needed if browser-reachable.

issues.title: Integrity minor: WIN-070 in our review ('Forensic Zoom chart proves kappa = 1.67 nT/uGal via L1A
issues.description: WIN-070 in our review ('Forensic Zoom chart proves kappa = 1.67 nT/uGal via L1A induction-residual analysis') has no corresponding WIN-070 on the dome wins page (dome only numbers WIN-001 through WIN-069). WIN-070 covers the dome home page Exhibit A forensic exhibit, not a separately-numbered WIN.
issues.suggested_fix: Informational. WIN-070 is a legitimate coverage extension of material on the dome home page (not the wins list). No action required unless the dome renumbers to include this content.

issues.title: Integrity informational: Dome site has a new page: john09289.github.io/predictions/review-response.html (
issues.description: Dome site has a new page: john09289.github.io/predictions/review-response.html ('Review Response & Strawman Control'). Meta description: 'Current anti-strawman response layer for the Ovoid Cavity site. Separates genuine open problems from category errors and links directly into the public evidence surfaces.' This is a direct response to external reviews (likely including ours).
issues.suggested_fix: Add review-response.html to poller's monitored pages if not already tracked. Analyst should read and assess whether any dome responses engage with our specific WIN verdicts in a way that requires counter-argumentation in our review.
